base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wily_castle_bosses — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Wily Castle bosses — Mecha Dragon (opening), Picopico-kun (block-assembler), Guts Tank, Boobeam Trap. 1067×746. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wily Castle bosses — Mecha Dragon (opening), Picopico-kun (block-assembler), Guts Tank, Boobeam Trap. 1067×746
